character.definition: vegetable, (non-classical, abbreviated from, same as 橦) a tree which grows in Yunnan, from the flowers of which a cloth is made
to beat; to strike; to attack, to move with happiness; excited, (a corrupted form) to laugh at
to eat meat; (same as 肘) the elbow; (same as 腬) fine quality of meat; (same as 衄) nosebleed
the declining sun in the west
the lichee, a fruit which grows in South China
river and county in Hebei province
(Cant.) the sound of urination; baby-talk for urinating, pee-pee
